Name: Wyrm-Speech
Description: Names are power. With this Gift, the philodox turns their very voice into a weapon, tearing into a spirit as if they existed in the primordial times whene to speak was to give form to the entities of the Umbra. Only now, such abilities have becomes debased and what's left is the use of the voice to cause hurt and damage, to tear at the name of the spirit without even understanding what it is. This Gift is taught by Nameless spirits, but also Drattosi and Grey Masses.
System:
Unleashing a load roar or a fell chant, the Garou tears at a spirit or creature's true name. Most targets resist this power with their Composure + Resolve, though in combat any Conflict pool might be used to resist the effects of Wyrm-speech. The target takes Superficial damage to Health or Willpower for each point of margin on a success (Gift user's choice). Each pair of 10s (critical results) can make onf of those levels of damage Aggravated in addition to counting towards the margin of success.
 Additionally, this Gift can target and destroy Talismans. When targeting a Talisman, the Difficulty equals 2 + the Talisman or Talen's cost. On a success the Talisman or Talen is rendered inert for the rest of the story. With a critical  or a margin of 2 or higher, a Talen is destroyed. A critical result or a margin of 4 or higher destroys a Talisman.
